message:
fix(vendored): guard division-by-zero, integer overflow, and unchecked ShellExecuteW

Three bug fixes in vendored crates:

- font/ftwrap.rs: guard cap_height / selected_size.height against
  division by zero when height is 0.0 (return 0.0 ratio instead)
- lfucache/lib.rs: replace tick arithmetic with wrapping_sub/wrapping_add
  to prevent integer overflow panic after extended cache usage when the
  u64 tick counter wraps
- open-url/lib.rs: capture ShellExecuteW return value and log error
  when result <= 32 (the Win32 error threshold), instead of silently
  ignoring failures to open URLs on Windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
